name: Parker D03 Hydraulic Manifold Block 4-Station
description: The Parker D03 hydraulic manifold block provides a compact fluid distribution solution for four D03-size directional control valves. Precision-machined from 6061-T6 aluminum, it features common pressure and tank ports with individual work port outputs.
shortDescription: D03 hydraulic manifold block, 4-station, 6061-T6 aluminum, 300 bar.
technicalDescription: 4-station subplate manifold for D03/NG6 CETOP valve pattern. Hard-anodized aluminum construction with drilled cross-ports and SAE O-ring boss ports. Maximum operating pressure 300 bar with certified pressure ratings.
features: Common P, T, and optional auxiliary ports
benefits: Reduces piping complexity with integrated fluid distribution
Lightweight aluminum construction reduces system weight
Leak-free connections with O-ring seal ports
seoDescription: Parker D03/NG6 hydraulic manifold block, 4-station, 6061-T6 aluminum, 300 bar. For hydraulic power units and machine tool applications.

faq.question: What valves can be mounted?
faq.answer: Any valve with D03/NG6 CETOP 03 mounting pattern including directional, pressure, and flow control valves.

faq.question: What is the maximum flow capacity?
faq.answer: Maximum flow capacity through the manifold is 80 L/min depending on port sizes and internal drilling.

faq.question: Can custom porting be added?
faq.answer: Yes, custom drilling patterns are available on special order for specific circuit requirements.

name: Bosch Rexroth VTS Series Pneumatic Valve Manifold (8 Valves)
description: The Bosch Rexroth VTS Series pneumatic valve manifold integrates up to 8 solenoid valves in one compact assembly with common supply and exhaust ports. The modular manifold system reduces tubing and installation time for automated machinery.
shortDescription: Pneumatic valve manifold, 8-station, 24 VDC, IP65, fieldbus ready.
technicalDescription: Modular pneumatic valve manifold for up to 8 single or double solenoid valves. Integrated multi-pin or fieldbus connection, common P (1) and R (3) ports, and individual cylinder ports per station. IP65 rated with LED diagnostics.
features: Modular design for up to 8 valve stations
Common pressure and exhaust ports simplify piping
LED status indicators per valve station
benefits: Reduces tubing by up to 80% compared to individual valves
Faster installation with single multi-pin connection
Compact design saves control cabinet space
seoTitle: Bosch Rexroth VTS Pneumatic Valve Manifold | 8 Station
seoDescription: Bosch Rexroth VTS pneumatic valve manifold, 8-station, 5/2 valves, IP65, IO-Link capable. For assembly and packaging automation.

faq.question: What fieldbus protocols are supported?
faq.answer: Profinet, EtherNet/IP, IO-Link, and PROFIBUS DP fieldbus connection modules are available.

faq.question: Can valve stations be added later?
faq.answer: Yes, the modular system allows adding or removing stations to meet changing requirements.

faq.question: What is the flow rate per valve?
faq.answer: Each valve station provides 550 L/min (ANR) at 6 bar supply pressure.

name: SMC SY3000 Series Valve Manifold (10 Station)
description: The SMC SY3000 is a compact valve manifold system offering 10-station capacity with plug-in electrical connections. Designed for high-density pneumatic applications, it features quick-response valves and a common supply plate.
shortDescription: Compact valve manifold, 10-station, plug-in electrical, 24 VDC, 600 L/min.
technicalDescription: 10-station valve manifold with plug-in power and signal connections, base plate with common pressure and exhaust, and individual 5/2-way valves with coil LED. G 3/8" supply and individual G 1/4" ports.
features: High flow rate of 600 L/min per valve
Common supply and exhaust base plate
Manual override on each valve station
benefits: Dramatically reduces installation time with plug-in design
Saves cabinet space with high-density configuration
Simplifies maintenance with individual valve replacement
seoDescription: SMC SY3000 compact valve manifold system, 10-station, 600 L/min, 24 VDC plug-in. For automotive, electronics, and packaging automation.

faq.question: What valve functions are available?
faq.answer: Available in 5/2 single solenoid, 5/2 double solenoid, and 5/3 closed-center or pressure-centered configurations.

faq.question: What is the response time?
faq.answer: Valve response time is typically 10 ms or less at rated voltage and pressure.

faq.question: Can the manifold be expanded?
faq.answer: Yes, SY3000 manifolds can be extended up to 20 stations using additional base plates and tie-rod assemblies.

name: Parker 3-Valve Instrumentation Manifold
description: The Parker 3-valve instrumentation manifold provides isolation and calibration access for differential pressure transmitters. Constructed from 316 stainless steel, it features two isolation valves and one equalizing valve in a compact body.
shortDescription: 3-valve DP transmitter manifold, 316 SS, 6,000 psi, NPT connections.
technicalDescription: Integral 3-valve manifold for DP transmitter mounting. Two isolation valves (HP and LP) and one equalizing valve with non-rotating stems. Mounts directly to transmitter with 1/2" NPT connections. Packing below thread design.
features: Non-rotating stem tips prevent seat galling
Packing below thread design for cleanliness
benefits: Eliminates additional fittings and leak points
seoDescription: Parker 3-valve DP transmitter manifold, 316 stainless steel, 6,000 psi. For transmitter isolation and calibration in oil & gas and chemical processes.

faq.question: What is the function of the equalizing valve?
faq.answer: The equalizing valve allows balancing HP and LP sides before zero calibration of the DP transmitter.

faq.question: Can this be used on oxygen service?
faq.answer: Special cleaning for oxygen service is available. Standard manifold is not oxygen-cleaned.

faq.question: What torque should be applied to stem packing?
faq.answer: Recommended packing nut torque is 20-25 Nm for PTFE and 30-35 Nm for graphite packing.

name: Bosch Rexroth SAE06 Hydraulic Manifold (4-Way)
description: The Bosch Rexroth SAE06 hydraulic manifold provides a precision-machined porting block for SAE 06 (1-1/16-12 UN) port size hydraulic valves. Made from 4140 steel with phosphate coating, this 4-way manifold distributes flow to actuators.
shortDescription: SAE06 hydraulic manifold, 4-way, 4140 steel, 350 bar, phosphate coated.
technicalDescription: 4-way hydraulic manifold block for SAE 06 port pattern valves. Manufactured from 4140 alloy steel with drilled and tapped SAE O-ring boss ports. Phosphate surface treatment for corrosion resistance. Certified to 350 bar working pressure.
features: 4-way configuration with P, T, A, B ports
benefits: Handles extreme pressures for heavy-duty applications
Standard SAE pattern ensures valve compatibility
seoTitle: Bosch Rexroth SAE06 Hydraulic Manifold | 4-Way 350 bar
seoDescription: Bosch Rexroth SAE06 4-way hydraulic manifold block, 4140 steel, 350 bar, phosphate coated. For mobile, industrial, and marine hydraulics.

faq.question: What is the port thread specification?
faq.answer: SAE 06 uses 1-1/16-12 UN thread with O-ring face seal per SAE J514.

faq.question: Can this manifold be used for water hydraulics?
faq.answer: Standard carbon steel is not recommended for water hydraulics. For water service, a stainless steel variant is available.

faq.question: What is the burst pressure?
faq.answer: Minimum burst pressure is 1,400 bar (20,300 psi), providing a 4:1 safety factor.
